description: Complete inventory of all UI text, buttons, labels, placeholders, styling options, and animations across the storefront

notes.animations: Animations are hardcoded but documented for reference. They include fade-in-up, hover effects, and staggered delays for visual appeal.
notes.homepageImprovements: Homepage UI has been enhanced with premium styling, smooth animations, gradient effects, and improved visual hierarchy (2026-01-19)
notes.sectionBackgrounds: All homepage sections now support configurable background styles (solid, gradient, color-mix, pattern, animated-gradient, glass) via homepage.sections.{sectionType}.background (2026-01-16)
notes.instagramFeed: Added Instagram feed section with configurable username and background styling (2026-01-16)
notes.sectionReordering: Homepage section order is fully configurable via homepage.sectionOrder array, including new instagramFeed section (2026-01-16)

status.configurable: Text/styling is configurable via storefront-control CMS

orderTracking.description: Order tracking page for non-logged-in users. Allows customers to track orders using order number and email address.

components.name: TrackOrderClient

uiElements.default: Enter your order number and email address to view your order status and tracking information.
You can find your order number in your confirmation email.
The email address you used when placing the order.
Order not found. Please check your order number and email address.
An error occurred while tracking your order. Please try again.
Sign up to track all your orders, save your addresses, and enjoy faster checkout.

features: Order lookup by number and email
Full order details display (reuses OrderDetailsClient component)
Create account CTA after order found (links to /login page)
Enhanced card styling with shadow-lg and hover effects
Back to orders button hidden for non-logged-in users

cards.ctaCard: shadow-lg with hover:shadow-xl and hover:opacity-90 on button

components.notes: This page allows non-logged-in users to track their orders. After finding an order, it displays the full order details using the same OrderDetailsClient component used in the account section, but with hideBackToOrders=true prop (hides back to orders button), a disabled reorder action, and a CTA to create an account that links to /login (not /register). All cards have enhanced styling with shadow-lg and hover effects.

contact.description: Contact page with form, FAQs, and social links. Includes store logo in hero section.

components.name: ContactPage

uiElements.description: Store logo displayed in hero section (same as header/footer)

uiElements.default: Have a question or need help? We're here for you. Reach out through any of the channels below or fill out the contact form.
We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
Tell us more about your inquiry...
Thank you for reaching out. We'll be in touch soon.
Find quick answers to common questions.
Stay connected for updates, tips, and exclusive offers.

uiElements.description: Labels for contact method cards (Email, Phone, Address)

default.question: What are your shipping times?
default.answer: Most orders ship within 24 hours. Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days, and express delivery takes 1-2 business days.

default.question: Do you offer international shipping?
default.answer: Yes! We ship worldwide. International delivery typically takes 7-14 business days depending on the destination.

default.question: What is your return policy?
default.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy on all unused items in original packaging. Returns are free within the continental US.

uiElements.description: Array of FAQ items with question and answer. Can be added/removed/edited in storefront-control CMS.

features: Store logo display in hero section
Social media links with proper icons (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, YouTube, TikTok, Pinterest)
Contact methods (email, phone, address) with configurable labels from store config
components.notes: Contact page displays store logo in hero section. Social media icons use proper SVG icons (not just letters). All text is configurable through storefront-control CMS. Contact methods (email, phone, address) come from store config.

uiElements.description: Text between count and search query (e.g., '10 for shoes')

uiElements.note: Feature flag, button text is hardcoded
Feature flag, button text is hardcoded

cart: Quantity input labels (no visible labels, just input controls)
wishlist: Header item count text format (calculated: {count} item{plural})
hardcodedElements.note: All text elements are now configurable except icon-only buttons and calculated/formatted text

notes: All UI text is now configurable via storefront-control CMS
Remaining hardcoded elements are icon-only buttons or calculated/formatted text
All styling (colors, fonts, borders, font sizes) is configurable
Button styles are fully configurable per variant
Badge styles are fully configurable per type
Font sizes are configurable for all text elements (h1-h4, body, small, button, caption)
RTL/LTR support is built-in with logical properties and direction-aware alignment
Field naming is consistent across schema, types, sample config, and inventory (camelCase)

intentionalDuplicates.note: Some field names appear in multiple schemas but are properly scoped by context
examples: searchPlaceholder: general (newsletter), filters (product search), navbar (header search)

error.description: Error page shown when application errors occur

uiElements.default: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for. It might have been moved or doesn't exist.
